title: Sales Representatives, Wholesale and Manufacturing, Technical and Scientific Products
description: Sell goods for wholesalers or manufacturers where technical or scientific knowledge is required in such areas as biology, engineering, chemistry, and electronics, normally obtained from at least 2 years of postsecondary education.

tasks.text: Negotiate prices or terms of sales or service agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit sales contracts for orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Visit establishments to evaluate needs or to promote product or service sales.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain customer records, using automated systems.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Answer customers' questions about products, prices, availability, or credit terms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Quote prices, credit terms, or other bid specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact new or existing customers to discuss how specific products or services can meet their needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Emphasize product features, based on analyses of customers' needs and on technical knowledge of product capabilities and limitations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute customer's installation or production costs and estimate savings from new services, products, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select or assist customers in selecting products based on customer needs, product specifications, and applicable regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare sales presentations or proposals to explain product specifications or applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete expense reports, sales reports, or other paperwork.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify that delivery schedules meet project deadlines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify prospective customers, using business directories, leads from existing clients, participation in organizations, or trade show or conference attendance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform customers of estimated delivery schedules, service contracts, warranties, or other information pertaining to purchased products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with colleagues to exchange information, such as selling strategies or marketing information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide customers with ongoing technical support.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise customers on product usage to improve production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study documentation or other information for new scientific or technical products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock or distribute resources, such as samples or promotional or educational materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend sales or trade meetings or read related publications to obtain information about market conditions, business trends, environmental regulations, or industry developments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sell service contracts for technical or scientific products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate the operation or use of technical or scientific products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide feedback to product design teams so that products can be tailored to clients' needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for installation and testing of products or machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Initiate sales campaigns to meet sales and production expectations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify accuracy of materials lists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify customer credit ratings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with engineers regarding technical problems with products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sell technical and scientific products that are environmentally sound or designed for environmental remediation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Visit establishments, such as pharmacies, to determine product sales.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present information to customers about the energy efficiency or environmental impact of scientific or technical products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform customers about issues related to responsible use and disposal of products, such as waste reduction or product or byproduct recycling or disposal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
